scripts.clean: pnpm run clean:workspaces && pnpm run clean:root && pnpm run clean:cache
scripts.clean:workspaces: pnpm -r --parallel exec rm -rf dist lib build .next out esm cjs types coverage test-results playwright-report .tsbuildinfo tsconfig.tsbuildinfo .turbo
scripts.clean:full:
pnpm run clean && rm -rf node_modules pnpm-lock.yaml && echo '
✓ Full clean complete. Run: pnpm install'
